intentSynonyms: get an asset price in coinbase
look up an asset price in coinbase
fetch a single asset price in coinbase
view one specific asset price in coinbase
get current price for an asset in coinbase
description: Get the current price of a cryptocurrency asset by UUID. Returns the latest price, timestamp, and quote currency. Use get_asset_by_symbol or get_asset_by_slug first to find the UUID if needed.
